task_description: Build a self-evolving AI development kernel - a filesystem-based orchestration system that any AI agent can read and be guided by. Includes: BOOT.md entry point, workflow graph, state management, knowledge store with composable skills, self-evolution engine, philosophy-guided prompts (Dao De Jing + Art of War), and comprehensive tests at 90%+ coverage. External skills (Ralph, UI/UX) are integrated. Runner.py provides the execution loop.

verification.summary: 183 tests pass, 99.35% coverage (well above 90% threshold). Runner dry-run works. All 27 skills registered. No symlinks. All kernel modules importable. Semantic review issues addressed: path normalization bypass fixed, rollback gap fixed, runner/BOOT.md documentation clarified, 12 adversarial path tests added.
